name: Chicken with Wine Sauce
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: New Dieter's Cookbook
Preparation Time: 1:05
Rinse chicken and pat dry with paper towels. Spray a large skillet with nonstick cooking spray.
Add mushrooms, onion, basil, and garlic. Cook over medium heat until onion is tender.
Stir in chicken broth, white wine, salt, and pepper. Arrange chicken in the skillet.
Bring to boiling; reduce heat. Cover and cook over low heat for about 30 minutes or until chicken is tender and no longer pink.
Transfer chicken and vegetables to a serving platter; keep warm.
Measure remaining liquid; if necessary, add water to equal 1 cup. Pour into the skillet.
Combine cornstarch and water. Stir into remaining liquid in the skillet.
Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Cook for 2 minutes more.
Serve over chicken.
